title: HVAC missed-call recovery tool
objective: Turn one missed-call event into one operator review step and one owner-facing output.

steps.name: Receive missed-call event
steps.description: Accept a single missed-call event from the phone system and validate required fields.

steps.name: Operator review
steps.description: Present the missed call to an operator for classification and follow-up decision.

steps.name: Generate owner summary
steps.description: Create a concise owner-facing summary describing the call and operator action.

acceptance_criteria: A valid missed-call event creates one review item.
An operator can review and classify the item in one step.
Completing review generates one owner-facing summary.
Duplicate call_id events do not create extra review items.
The system records timestamps for intake, review, and output generation.
